title: useToast
description: Imperative API to push notifications onto a global toast queue. Mount ToastContainer once near the root; any component can call `useToast()` to fire toasts that appear in the container.

api.push: Push a toast with full control. Returns an id so you can `dismiss(id)` or re-push to update in place.
api.dismiss: Remove a single toast by the id returned from `push()`.
api.dismissAll: Clear every toast in the queue at once.

basic.title: Basic colors
basic.desc: The four convenience wrappers cover most use cases.

action.title: With action
action.desc: Add an inline action button. The `close` callback dismisses the toast.

pinned.title: Pinned toast
pinned.desc: Set `duration: 0` to keep the toast visible until the user dismisses it.

update.title: Update in place
update.desc: Re-push with the same `id` to replace the toast without creating a new one — perfect for live progress.
